sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this document defines the regulatory pathway and roadmap for {device_name_model} across {target_markets}. Drives technical file {ref:RA-002}, submissions log {ref:RA-004}, and PMS plan {ref:RA-005}.

sections.title: 3. Classification per Market
sections.ai_rows_prompt: For each of {target_markets} provide classification (EU MDR Annex VIII rule, FDA 21 CFR 862–892 product code + class I/II/III, UK MDR 2002, Health Canada, TGA, PMDA) and the conformity-assessment/submission pathway (e.g. EU MDR Annex IX Notified Body, FDA 510(k) / De Novo / PMA, UKCA Approved Body). Return JSON array.

sections.title: 4. Strategy Principles
clauses: 4.3 Clinical evidence strategy (existing data, equivalence, new investigation, PMCF)
4.5 Authorised Representative / US Agent / UK Responsible Person
4.6 Sequencing and submission timing across markets
sections.section_prompt: For each principle, describe the approach for {device_name_model} in 2–3 sentences.

sections.title: 5. Submission Roadmap
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 8–12 milestones (pre-submission meeting, technical file freeze, NB application, audit stage 1/2, response to deficiencies, CE certificate, FDA 510(k) submission, AI/Substantive review, clearance, market launch). Dependencies cite documents like {ref:RA-002}, {ref:RD-006}, {ref:CA-001}. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 6. Post-Market Strategy
sections.section_prompt: Outline how PMS plan {ref:RA-005}, PSUR/PMCF {ref:RA-006}, vigilance {ref:CA-005}, and FSCA {ref:CA-006} maintain market access after launch.
